args.command: mkdir -p session_plan && ls session_plan/ 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat ISSUES_TODAY.md 2>/dev/null || echo "NO ISSUES_TODAY.md"

payload.command: mkdir -p session_plan && ls session_plan/ 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat ISSUES_TODAY.md 2>/dev/null || echo "NO ISSUES_TODAY.md"

args.command: grep -n '^pub fn\|^pub struct\|^pub enum\|^fn ' src/commands_state.rs | head -60

payload.command: grep -n '^pub fn\|^pub struct\|^pub enum\|^fn ' src/commands_state.rs | head -60

args.command: grep -n 'mod commands_state\|use commands_state\|pub mod commands_state\|commands_state_crashes\|commands_state_graph\|commands_state_memory' src/commands_state.rs | head -20

payload.command: grep -n 'mod commands_state\|use commands_state\|pub mod commands_state\|commands_state_crashes\|commands_state_graph\|commands_state_memory' src/commands_state.rs | head -20

args.command: grep -n 'mod commands_state\|pub mod commands_state' src/lib.rs | head -10

payload.command: grep -n 'mod commands_state\|pub mod commands_state' src/lib.rs | head -10

args.command: grep -n '^fn build_state_summary\|^fn format_state_lifecycle\|^fn model_completion\|^fn event_summary_json\|^fn build_why_report\|^fn format_context\|^fn format_hypothesis\|^fn format_patch_candidate\|^fn format_promotion\|^fn format_metric_evidence\|^fn format_fixture_suite\|^fn format_protocol_check\|^fn format_rollback_row\|^fn build_rollback\|^fn handle_failures\|^fn build_recent_failure\|^fn classify_failure\|^fn build_policy\|^fn build_failure_fix\|^fn handle_rollbacks\|^fn handle_fixes\|^fn handle_policies\|^fn handle_cache\|^fn handle_evals\|^fn handle_patches\|^fn handle_lineage\|^fn handle_why\|^fn handle_tail\|^fn handle_state_summary' src/commands_state.rs

payload.command: grep -n '^fn build_state_summary\|^fn format_state_lifecycle\|^fn model_completion\|^fn event_summary_json\|^fn build_why_report\|^fn format_context\|^fn format_hypothesis\|^fn format_patch_candidate\|^fn format_promotion\|^fn format_metric_evidence\|^fn format_fixture_suite\|^fn format_protocol_check\|^fn format_rollback_row\|^fn build_rollback\|^fn handle_failures\|^fn build_recent_failure\|^fn classify_failure\|^fn build_policy\|^fn build_failure_fix\|^fn handle_rollbacks\|^fn handle_fixes\|^fn handle_policies\|^fn handle_cache\|^fn handle_evals\|^fn handle_patches\|^fn handle_lineage\|^fn handle_why\|^fn handle_tail\|^fn handle_state_summary' src/commands_state.rs

args.command: grep -n '^fn handle_tail\|^fn handle_why\|^fn handle_state_summary\|^fn build_state_summary\|^fn build_why_report\|^fn handle_failures\|^fn build_recent_failure\|^fn classify_failure_event\|^fn build_policy_report\|^fn build_rollback_report\|^fn handle_rollbacks\|^fn handle_fixes\|^fn handle_policies\|^fn handle_cache\|^fn handle_evals\|^fn handle_patches\|^fn handle_lineage' src/commands_state.rs

payload.command: grep -n '^fn handle_tail\|^fn handle_why\|^fn handle_state_summary\|^fn build_state_summary\|^fn build_why_report\|^fn handle_failures\|^fn build_recent_failure\|^fn classify_failure_event\|^fn build_policy_report\|^fn build_rollback_report\|^fn handle_rollbacks\|^fn handle_fixes\|^fn handle_policies\|^fn handle_cache\|^fn handle_evals\|^fn handle_patches\|^fn handle_lineage' src/commands_state.rs

args.command: grep -n '^fn handle_tail\|^fn handle_why\|^fn handle_state_summary\|^fn build_state_summary\|^fn build_why_report\|^fn handle_failures\|^fn build_recent_failure\|^fn classify_failure_event\|^fn build_policy_report\|^fn build_rollback_report\|^fn handle_rollbacks\|^fn handle_fixes\|^fn handle_policies\|^fn handle_cache\|^fn handle_evals\|^fn handle_patches\|^fn handle_lineage\|^fn read_tail\|^fn read_tail_events\|^fn read_limited_events\|^fn print_event_line\|^fn format_event_value\|^fn event_payload_summary\|^fn compact_payload_summary\|^fn tool_arg_summary\|^fn format_failure_event_value\|^fn build_trace_report\|^fn build_lineage_report\|^fn format_rollback_row' src/commands_state.rs

payload.command: grep -n '^fn handle_tail\|^fn handle_why\|^fn handle_state_summary\|^fn build_state_summary\|^fn build_why_report\|^fn handle_failures\|^fn build_recent_failure\|^fn classify_failure_event\|^fn build_policy_report\|^fn build_rollback_report\|^fn handle_rollbacks\|^fn handle_fixes\|^fn handle_policies\|^fn handle_cache\|^fn handle_evals\|^fn handle_patches\|^fn handle_lineage\|^fn read_tail\|^fn read_tail_events\|^fn read_limited_events\|^fn print_event_line\|^fn format_event_value\|^fn event_payload_summary\|^fn compact_payload_summary\|^fn tool_arg_summary\|^fn format_failure_event_value\|^fn build_trace_report\|^fn build_lineage_report\|^fn format_rollback_row' src/commands_state.rs

args.command: grep -n '^fn event_string\|^fn event_timestamp\|^fn find_target_event\|^fn is_failure_event_type\|^fn event_at\|^fn event_bool\|^fn event_i64\|^fn payload_str\|^fn extract_patch_id\|^fn preview_line' src/commands_state.rs | head -20

payload.command: grep -n '^fn event_string\|^fn event_timestamp\|^fn find_target_event\|^fn is_failure_event_type\|^fn event_at\|^fn event_bool\|^fn event_i64\|^fn payload_str\|^fn extract_patch_id\|^fn preview_line' src/commands_state.rs | head -20

args.command: grep -n 'fn event_string\|fn preview_line\|fn event_at\|fn event_bool\|fn event_i64' src/commands_state.rs | head -10

payload.command: grep -n 'fn event_string\|fn preview_line\|fn event_at\|fn event_bool\|fn event_i64' src/commands_state.rs | head -10

args.command: grep -n 'fn is_eval_event\|fn patch_summaries\|fn normalize_status\|fn payload_str\|fn payload_scalar_label\|fn eval_failed\|fn eval_status_label\|fn payload_string_array\|pub(crate) fn' src/commands_state.rs | grep -E '^[0-9]+:pub\(crate\) fn' | head -20

payload.command: grep -n 'fn is_eval_event\|fn patch_summaries\|fn normalize_status\|fn payload_str\|fn payload_scalar_label\|fn eval_failed\|fn eval_status_label\|fn payload_string_array\|pub(crate) fn' src/commands_state.rs | grep -E '^[0-9]+:pub\(crate\) fn' | head -20

args.command: grep -n '^fn is_eval_event\|^fn patch_summaries\|^fn normalize_status\|^fn payload_str\|^pub(crate) fn is_eval_event\|^pub(crate) fn patch_summaries\|^pub(crate) fn normalize_status\|^pub(crate) fn payload_str' src/commands_state.rs

payload.command: grep -n '^fn is_eval_event\|^fn patch_summaries\|^fn normalize_status\|^fn payload_str\|^pub(crate) fn is_eval_event\|^pub(crate) fn patch_summaries\|^pub(crate) fn normalize_status\|^pub(crate) fn payload_str' src/commands_state.rs
